package.name: octomap_ros2_humble
package.description:
A complete ROS 2 Humble port of OctoMap with modern architecture. Provides server/client nodes for 3D occupancy mapping from point clouds.
Features: - OctoMapServer: Generates 3D occupancy maps from point cloud input - OctoMapClient: Receives and analyzes OctoMap binary data - SmokeTest: Utility for end-to-end pipeline testing - Conversion utilities for ROS 2 message types
package.author: Original: A. Hornung, University of Freiburg
ROS 2 Port: taeraemon-bot with Mashiro
